name: vidis-check
description: Validates a web app or codebase against the VIDIS Prüfkriterien V0.2 (eduCheck digital). Checks all criteria from both Prüfbereiche: Recht & Datenschutz and IT-Sicherheit. Produces a structured compliance report with PASS / FAIL / MANUELL (needs human review) for each criterion. Use when asked to "vidis check", "VIDIS prüfen", "eduCheck prüfen", or "VIDIS-Kriterien".
